creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
Trying to update the source tree from "http://svn.freebsd.org/base/stable/8" leads to "svn: E000054: Error retrieving REPORT: Connection reset by peer" after retriving some updates or immediately.

Installed:
neon29-0.29.6_4                An HTTP and WebDAV client library for Unix systems
subversion-1.8.0_1             Version control system

How-To-Repeat: Upgrade to subversion 1.8.0
